title: xyris ferreirae
intro: Xyris ferreirae, also known as the Yellow Eyebane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. It is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa, traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Xyris ferreirae is often prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its health benefits and provide relief from various ailments.
